evals.name: fork-and-extract
evals.prompt: extract E2E test cases from raw/articles/BRD_PRD.md
evals.expected_output: Discovers xlsx in test-plans/. Presents classification table of ACs/FRs as E2E or NOT-E2E. After user confirmation, forks xlsx with version suffix (-2, -3, etc.), appends header+step rows for each E2E test case, prints coverage report showing covered and skipped requirements.

assertions.name: classification-table-shown
assertions.description: Output contains a markdown table with columns Req ID, Summary, Classification, Reason, Proposed Test Title

assertions.name: user-confirmation-gate
assertions.description: Skill pauses and asks user to confirm classifications before proceeding

assertions.name: versioned-file-created
assertions.description: A new xlsx file with version suffix (e.g., -2.xlsx or -3.xlsx) was created in test-plans/

assertions.name: original-untouched
assertions.description: The original xlsx file was not modified (byte-preserving fork via shutil.copy2)

assertions.name: header-step-structure
assertions.description: New xlsx contains Test Case header rows (Work Item Type = Test Case, Title filled) followed by numbered step rows (sequential Test Step integers)

assertions.name: coverage-report-present
assertions.description: Output contains Covered and Skipped sections with requirement IDs mapped to test case titles or skip reasons, plus a Total summary line

evals.name: dedup-skip
evals.prompt: extract E2E test cases from raw/articles/BRD_PRD.md
evals.expected_output: Discovers xlsx that already contains the extracted test cases. Detects duplicate titles in existing header rows. Skips all duplicates and reports zero new test cases added.

assertions.name: duplicates-reported
assertions.description: Output mentions skipped duplicates by title, indicating test cases already exist in the xlsx

assertions.name: no-new-version-created
assertions.description: No new versioned xlsx file was created since all test cases were duplicates
